function.name: VoxTell
function.description: Runs VoxTell segmentation on a CT/scalar volume using text prompts to identify targets. Use this when a user requests segmentation based on textual descriptions (e.g., 'segment the spine', 'find liver'). Requires an input volume node name.

text_prompts.description: List of text prompts describing the structures to segment (e.g., ['spine', 'liver']).

use_gpu.description: Whether to run inference on GPU instead of CPU. Default is True.

model_path.description: Path to the VoxTell model directory. If not provided, the default model location is used.
